gpu: AMD Radeon RX 7900 XT (radeonsi, navi31, LLVM 19.1.0, DRM 3.59, 6.11.9-303.bazzite.fc41.x86_64)
notes:
Game runs for about a minute or so, but before I have a chance to do much of anything it crashes my GPU.

I tried using ALVR first but couldn't get the game to connect to my headset to see or control the game. The game doesn't seem to crash in this instance...presumably because you can't do anything that would trigger the crash.

Sad, I really wanted to play this game day one, but I refunded for now until smarter heads figure this one out... :(
